title: Create Space with Files Column
excerpt:
I’m a Refferal Partner. I can add a Files column in partnersworkflows.monday.com, but I can’t create a new Space. I can’t create a Files column in my free Monday.com account, but I can create a new Space. 
I just want to…

posts.author: alanhalley (Alan Halley)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m a Refferal Partner. I can add a Files column in partnersworkflows.monday.com, but I can’t create a new Space. I can’t create a Files column in my free Monday.com account, but I can create a new Space.

I just want to create a Space with a Files column.

Any suggestions?

Thanks.

Alan

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Alan,

Just to clarify, are you referring to monday spaces? Can I ask if you’re an admin of your partners account? This might be why you’re unable to create a space.

In regard to the files column, can you let me know if there’s a specific error message that you’re receiving when attempting to set up the column? In addition, are you the board owner?

Thanks for your help on this

posts.author: alanhalley (Alan Halley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Bianca,

Monday Spaces: https://www.mondayspaces.com/

I am not an admin on http://partnersworkflows.monday.com/

I am the admin on my free Monday.com account, but I receive a message to upgrade to a Basic account to create a Files column.

Thanks.

Alan
